_generated: Authoritative lane-decision contract (Phase 1, GAP_ASSESSMENT_S9 §9.4). Hand-authored policy artifact; edited deliberately, covered by tests/test_lane_policy.py. Consumed by app.lane_policy.decide_lane and vendored on the agent-cloud side (the proposal path runs in-process there). The api executor re-validates independently (belt #2).

doc.semantics: final_lane = strictest(agent_default_lane, per-action base lane, risk-flag escalations). Strictness order: Lane 1 (AUTO) < Lane 2 (SINGLE) < Lane 3 (DUAL). Mirrors runtime.lane_router.route_lane's strictest-wins model.
doc.hard_safety_invariant: If ANY of money / contract / irreversible is true, the write can NEVER be Lane 1, regardless of agent trust tier. It is floored at Lane 2 and escalates to Lane 3 under dual-approval conditions. This is Charles's core HITL guarantee.
doc.lane1_eligibility: Lane 1 (auto-execute) is possible ONLY when (a) the agent is tier-2-auto, (b) the action is marked lane1_eligible, and (c) no money/contract/irreversible/low_confidence/cost_impact/critical_path risk flag is set.

money.description: touches a monetary value (deal value, cost)

contract.description: changes contractual state (deal won/lost, contract fields)

irreversible.description: not cleanly reversible by a follow-up write

dual_approval_when.money_and_critical_path: money AND critical_path both set -> Lane 3
dual_approval_when.contract_and_cost_impact: contract AND cost_impact both set -> Lane 3

project_log_note.description: Append a construction-log entry. Reversible, no money/contract.

project_milestone_create.description: Create a milestone. Reversible, no money/contract.

project_update.description: Phase/status/notes change. Phase advance touches schedule critical path and is not cleanly reversible; terminal statuses are irreversible.

request_update.description: Mark a request complete/failed. Moderate; conservative default Lane 2.

deal_update.description: Sales deal change. value_usd is money; stage transitions are contractual and (won/lost) irreversible — ALWAYS Lane 2/3, never auto.
